name: essence-app
description: Essence - Landing Page con React + Node.js Backend

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: npm run free-port:5000 && cd server && npm run dev:v2
scripts.dev:server:legacy: npm run free-port:5000 && cd server && npm run dev
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.build: npm run validate:backend && cd client && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run validate:backend && cd client && npm run build
